[+] Execution halted due to exception after 37 cycles.

=== ARCHITECTURAL STATE (CYCLE 37) ===
x0:    0 | x1: -1965 | x2: -1820 | x3:  887 | x4: -2028 | x5:    0 | x6:   17 | x7:    0 | 
x8: -820 | x9: -2357 | x10: -465 | x11: -525 | x12:    0 | x13: 1255 | x14:  422 | x15:    0 | 
x16:    0 | x17: 2487 | x18:    0 | x19: 1850 | x20: -1614340 | x21:    0 | x22:    0 | x23: -1108 | 
x24:    0 | x25:    0 | x26: 1862 | x27:    0 | x28:    0 | x29:  682 | x30:  305 | x31:    1 |
